title: PMP Workorder Governance Contract
description: Machine-readable governance contract for PMP workorder files and checker behavior.

filename_pattern.description: Regular expression every permanent workorder filename must match.

reserved_filenames.description: Rolling or ambiguous names that destroy history and must not be used.

required_headings.description: Markdown headings every workorder must include.

completion_note_items.description: Items expected in executor completion notes for workorder-driven changes.

completion_note_items: lessons learned created or not needed
